summary: Stage 2 Audit Plans (BACF6-08) Feature Testing Complete. Backend: 21/21 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Admin page and Public client review page working correctly. Full workflow tested: create from job order → update → manager approve → send to client → client accept.

issues: Console warnings about HTML structure (<tr> cannot be child of <span>, <span> cannot be child of <tbody>) - cosmetic React hydration warning from development tooling, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: PDF generation using ReportLab produces professional bilingual document (207KB+)
Create modal with two source options: From Stage 1 Plan, From Job Order
Job order dropdown shows confirmed orders correctly
Public client review page shows all plan details including schedule table, team members, Stage 2 objectives
Client Accept/Request Changes buttons work correctly
Status badges correctly show draft, pending_manager, manager_approved, pending_client, client_accepted, changes_requested states
Arabic RTL support working correctly throughout pages
Purple/violet color theme differentiates Stage 2 from Stage 1 (teal)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stage 2 Audit Plans (BACF6-08) feature is fully functional. All backend endpoints at /api/stage2-audit-plans working. Admin page at /stage2-audit-plans shows stats (total, draft, approved, client accepted), table with plans, create modal with two source options (Stage 1 plan or Job Order), and edit modal with full details including team members and schedule table. Public client review page at /stage2-plan-review/:accessToken shows all plan details including Stage 2 objectives, schedule table, approval info, with Accept/Request Changes buttons (hidden after client response). PDF generation works (207KB+). The existing plan has status 'client_accepted'.

backend_endpoints.POST /api/stage2-audit-plans: Create from Stage 1 plan or job order - WORKING

frontend_components.stage2_audit_plans_page: Admin page at /stage2-audit-plans with RTL Arabic support
frontend_components.stats_cards: 4 cards showing total (1), draft (0), approved (0), client accepted (1)
frontend_components.plans_table: Shows organization, audit type, team leader, audit date, status, actions
frontend_components.create_modal: Opens with two source options - From Stage 1 Plan, From Job Order - filters for confirmed/accepted sources
frontend_components.edit_modal: Shows client contact, audit details, team leader (read-only), team members, schedule table, notes
frontend_components.link_modal: Shows client review link after sending to client
frontend_components.public_review_page: Shows plan details, Stage 2 objectives, schedule table, approval info, accept/request changes buttons

workflow_tested.create_flow: Create from confirmed job order - creates with team leader from job order
workflow_tested.update_flow: Update contact info, audit dates, team members, schedule - all saved correctly
workflow_tested.manager_approve: Manager approves plan → Status changes to manager_approved
workflow_tested.send_to_client: Admin sends review link → Status changes to pending_client
workflow_tested.client_accept: Client accepts via public link → Status changes to client_accepted
workflow_tested.client_request_changes: Client can request changes with reason → Status changes to changes_requested

pdf_content_verified.header: STAGE 2 AUDIT PLAN with BACF6-08 reference
pdf_content_verified.audit_details: Standards, dates, language, scope, audit type
pdf_content_verified.schedule_table: Date/time, process, process owner, clauses, auditor
pdf_content_verified.signatures: Team leader and client acceptance status

mocked_apis.note: No external integrations - all features are self-contained. Email sending is mocked (logs to console) but doesn't affect functionality.
